title: Red Pepper Crumble Ascendant
description: This herbal and crumbly Chinese dish features red pepper paste as the star ingredient, combined with other keto-friendly herbs and spices to create a show-stopping meal.
instructions: Mix red pepper paste, chives, turmeric powder, cumin seed, and sea salt in a bowl until well combined.
In another bowl, whisk eggs and add the spice mixture. Mix thoroughly so no lumps remain.
Add the almond flour to the egg-spice mixture and mix until fully incorporated without forming a ball of dough.
Sprinkle 1 tbsp water over the crumble and gently stir in with a fork or spoon until it becomes cohesive but not sticky.
Transfer the crumble mixture onto a greased baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown on top, stirring once during baking to prevent burning.
Remove from oven, sprinkle fresh mint leaves evenly over the crumble and let it cool slightly before serving.
Serve hot as part of your dinner. Enjoy!
